Buy a license

Confab has a free trial that starts the moment you download it. Requesting a key on this site adds another week of trial. A one-time purchase, with no subscription, is coming. Purchasing is not live yet.

Home Why a room License

How licensing works

  • Download Confab and the free trial starts straight away. Nothing to buy first.
  • Request a key on this site and we add another week to your trial while we finish the store.
  • When it ships, a license is a one-time purchase. There is no subscription to Confab itself.
